title: Malted Dutch Almond Pie
description: A bitter yet juicy almond pie with a malted crust and candied almond topping, perfect for festive celebrations.
instructions: Preheat oven to 190°C and grease an 8-inch tart pan.
In a large bowl mix almond flour, whole wheat flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt.
In a separate bowl whisk together malted barley syrup, vegetable oil, warm water, and almond extract.
Pour wet mixture into dry mixture and stir until combined, then knead with hands for 2 minutes until dough forms.
Press dough evenly into pan, ensuring a thick crust, and trim edges.
Bake crust for 15 minutes until lightly golden.
Remove crust from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Scatter candied almonds evenly over warm crust and return to oven for 10 minutes until almonds are caramelized.
Remove pie from oven and allow to cool completely before slicing.
Serve with a drizzle of maple syrup if desired.
